Journal

Notes from the intersection.

Writing about markets, making, and what it looks like to build something from the ground up.

  1. May 1, 2026 makingdesignADHDcraft

    The Year I Built Things

    A medical year away from school sounds like a setback. It turned into the most productive stretch of my life — and an unexpected answer to a question I didn't know I was asking.

  2. March 14, 2026 investingmarketsself-taught

    What I Learned by Losing Money at Ten Years Old

    Nobody teaches you that the first lesson in investing is what a bad decision feels like. Mine cost me money I'd saved for months. It also cost me the illusion that this was simple.
